summary: This document outlines the long-term strategic roadmap for KeepMeCompany, focusing on deploying AI phone agents for GP triage and elderly companionship within the UK NHS. It details a three-step growth plan targeting General Practitioners first, then expanding to loneliness reduction services, with projected market sizes of $450MM and $1Bn annually in the UK. The text includes operational data on GP costs and loneliness statistics but leaves competitor analysis sections blank.
